# Goblin Camp

## Theme

A chaotic goblin settlement hidden deep inside the wilderness.

Primitive traps, ambushes and overwhelming numbers make every encounter dangerous.

## Biome Gameplay

Goblin Camp teaches:

- fighting large groups
- reacting to ambushes
- destroying support enemies first
- avoiding traps

Unlike previous biomes, goblins rely on numbers instead of strength.

Rule:
Goblins are individually weak but dangerous together.

---

# Goblin

## Role

Basic Melee

## Difficulty

Easy

## Description

Small, reckless goblin warrior.

## AI

- Rushes toward the player.
- Attacks immediately.
- Rarely dodges.

## Basic Attack

Knife Slash

## Ability

None

Simple frontline unit.

## Required Animations

- Idle
- Walk
- Run
- Attack
- Death

## Optional Animations

- Hit

## VFX

- dust

## SFX

- goblin laugh
- knife slash

---

# Spear Goblin

## Role

Reach Fighter

## Difficulty

Medium

## Description

Keeps slightly more distance than normal goblins.

## AI

- Tries to stay just outside melee range.
- Uses long thrust attacks.

## Basic Attack

Spear Thrust

## Ability

Lunge

Performs a quick forward stab.

Effects

- medium damage
- slightly longer range

Cooldown

6 seconds.

## Required Animations

- Idle
- Walk
- Run
- Attack
- Lunge
- Death

## Optional Animations

- Hit

## VFX

- dust

## SFX

- spear thrust
- footsteps

---

# Goblin Shaman

## Role

Support Caster

## Difficulty

Medium

## Description

Uses primitive tribal magic.

Highest target priority.

## AI

Priority

1. Heal allies.
2. Buff nearby goblins.
3. Attack if alone.

## Basic Attack

Poison Orb

Small ranged projectile.

## Ability

Totem of Fury

Summons a wooden totem.

Effects

- nearby goblins gain attack speed
- lasts 10 seconds

Cooldown

12 seconds.

## Required Animations

- Idle
- Cast
- Death

## Optional Animations

- Hit

## Not Needed

- Walk
- Run

## VFX

- green magic
- tribal runes
- wooden totem

## SFX

- tribal chant
- poison magic

---

# Goblin Chief

## Role

Biome Boss

## Difficulty

Boss

## Description

Leader of the goblin tribe.

Cunning rather than powerful.

## AI

- Constantly calls reinforcements.
- Uses aggressive melee attacks.
- Controls nearby goblins.

## Basic Attack

Dual Axe Combo

## Ability 1

War Cry

Buffs nearby goblins.

Effects

- movement speed
- attack speed

## Ability 2

Goblin Rush

Summons 3 Goblins.

Cooldown

18 seconds.

## Ability 3

Explosive Barrel

Throws an explosive barrel.

Short delay before detonation.

## Phase 2

Triggered at 50% HP.

Changes

- summons more frequently
- War Cry cooldown reduced

## Phase 3

Triggered at 25% HP.

Enters Frenzy.

Effects

- attacks faster
- stops retreating
- aggressively chases player

## Required Animations

- Idle
- Walk
- Run
- Combo Attack
- Throw
- Roar
- Death

## Optional Animations

- Hit

## VFX

- tribal aura
- explosion
- dust

## SFX

- goblin roar
- barrel explosion
- war cry
